name: EFORT Intelligent Equipment Co., Ltd.
summary: Efort Intelligent Equipment Co., Ltd. designs and manufactures industrial automation equipment. The company provides customers with a range of industrial robot products and cross-industry intelligent manufacturing solutions. It offers industrial and painting robots. The company's products are used in palletizing, handling, polishing, welding, and spraying functional applications. It serves the food, 3C electronics, home appliance, ceramic, and automobile and component industries. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Wuhu, China.
